notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

S19 is a golden unit-test proof over the synthetic S01-S18 Permission And Audit Binding retry behavior chain and does not execute service logic, create runtime routes, run runtime permission checks, call AuthZ, append audit ledgers, write audit events, enqueue or execute retries, write retry queues/attempts/schedules/timers/workers, run Hermes validation, create Hermes evidence, write database/storage/product state, or complete RP00.P02.M05.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only on the expected missing CP00-015 evidence files; final RP00 validation is recorded after evidence creation.
The completed compact read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-015.
